name: label
title: Label
description: Plex UI Label — accessible label built on Radix Label.Root. Pairs with checkboxes, switches, or custom form layouts; use Field for stacked form rows.

files.content:
export { Label } from '@plexui/ui/components/Label';
export type { LabelProps } from '@plexui/ui/components/Label';

docs: Import as `import { Label } from '@/components/ui/label'`. See https://plexui.com/docs/components/label for full prop reference.
